articles.title: Australia court doubles payout for trans woman in landmark discrimination case - BBC
articles.description: Roxanne Tickle has been awarded AU$40,000 in damages for being kicked off the Giggle for Girls app.
articles.content: In Friday's Federal Court judgement, the full court found that Grover had engaged in unlawful direct discrimination, saying she had treated Tickle "who is a transgender woman, less favourably than a … [+67 chars]
